label: Aurorashade Hab
description: Aurorashade Hab is a prefabricated basaltcrete residence set beneath a low, ash-sealed roofline, its exterior sheathing vitrified by windblown grit and electrostatic discharge. The interior is arranged as a narrow sequence of pressure-tight chambers, with soot-scored bulkheads and a permanent haze of dust trapped by overworked filtration baffles. Shielded lumen strips cast a cold, steady light over utilitarian fittings, while lead-lined shutters blunt the bruise-colored auroral glare that dominates Vespera Tertius nights. A recessed vox alcove and redundant power couplings reflect the planet’s fixed condition of fractured transmission and unreliable supply.
